# QNAP

> QNAP Systems, Inc. provides NAS, networking, and storage solutions.

## Structured Data (Machine-Readable)

- [Compatibility Index](https://www.qnap.com/api/v1/compatibility/index.json): All NAS models with compatibility data
- [NAS Compatibility](https://www.qnap.com/api/v1/compatibility/nas/{model}.json): Compatible accessories for a NAS model
  Example: https://www.qnap.com/api/v1/compatibility/nas/TS-464.json

## Website Sections

- Products: https://www.qnap.com/go/product/
- Product Series: https://www.qnap.com/go/product/series/enterprise, https://www.qnap.com/go/product/series/smb, https://www.qnap.com/go/product/series/home
- Compatibility: https://www.qnap.com/go/compatibility
- Compatibility (Expansion): https://www.qnap.com/go/compatibility-expansion
- Download Center: https://www.qnap.com/go/download
- Solutions: https://www.qnap.com/go/solution/{slug}
- Software: https://www.qnap.com/go/software/{slug}
- How-To (Tutorial & FAQ): https://www.qnap.com/go/how-to/tutorial/article/{slug}
- News: https://www.qnap.com/go/news/{year}/{slug}
- Case Studies: https://www.qnap.com/go/case-studies/
- Mobile Apps: https://www.qnap.com/go/mobile-apps
- Utilities: https://www.qnap.com/go/utilities/essentials, https://www.qnap.com/go/utilities/enterprise, https://www.qnap.com/go/utilities/entertainment

## Sitemap

- [XML Sitemap](https://www.qnap.com/sitemap/sitemap.xml)

## Terms

Data is provided for informational purposes. Verify on https://www.qnap.com before purchasing.
